footer.tagline: Institutional DeFi Infrastructure for Latin America. Sovereign, compliant, on-chain.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Convexo Protocol — Sovereign Vault Institutional DeFi

home.headline: Institutional
home.subheadline: Sovereign liquidity protocols for the next generation of LATAM financial institutions. Real-world assets meets decentralized settlement.
home.rwaDesc: Our automated settlement layer uses proprietary AI to navigate complex regulatory requirements, while our tokenization engine brings deep liquidity to off-chain LATAM assets.
home.techIdentityDesc: Zero-knowledge identity verification that ensures regulatory compliance without compromising sovereign privacy.
home.techStablecoinsDesc: Collateral-backed digital currencies pegged to regional LATAM assets, minimizing FX volatility risks.
home.techVaultsDesc: Standardized yield-bearing vault infrastructure powering C-Bonds, Real Estate, and ETH Fund products.
home.techOtcDesc: AI-driven automated settlement for large-block trades, executing with institutional precision 24/7.
home.valuePropPrivacyDesc: Encrypted transactional data ensuring that institutional strategies remain confidential while remaining fully auditable on-chain.
home.valuePropSpeedDesc: Eliminating traditional T+2 settlement windows. Convexo provides T+0 finality for all regional and cross-border assets.
home.valuePropComplianceDesc: Full KYC/AML stack with 3-tier Digital ID system. Built to meet regulatory requirements across 20 LATAM jurisdictions.
home.prodPaymentsDesc: Institutional settlement layer for high-velocity international transfers with instant liquidity provisioning and OTC agentic channels.
home.prodCbondsDesc: Fractionalized corporate debt instruments secured by on-chain collateral and verified legal frameworks. 12%+ APY.
home.prodRealEstateDesc: On-chain exposure to premium LATAM commercial property yields via RWA tokenization. 18% Annual APY.
home.prodEthFundDesc: Active yield optimization for large-scale ETH positions using proprietary institutional-grade vaults.
home.prodP2pDesc: Autonomous matching engine for institutional counterparties, optimizing for slippage and privacy across LATAM currencies.

about.heroDesc: Convexo Protocol bridges traditional finance and decentralized infrastructure across Latin America — bringing institutional rigor, AI intelligence, and blockchain transparency to capital markets that need it most.
about.missionDesc: Our mission is to lead the convergence of traditional finance and disruptive technologies — applying Crypto, Blockchain, and Artificial Intelligence with institutional rigor. We foster a growth ecosystem through constant research and strategic partnerships with governments, academic institutions, and global infrastructure protocols.
about.visionDesc: To become the definitive institutional DeFi infrastructure layer for Latin America — where every SME, financial institution, and high-net-worth individual can access sovereign-grade financial products with full compliance, full transparency, and full control over their assets.
about.pillar1Desc: Every product is built with regulatory compliance as the foundation. KYC, AML, and CFT frameworks are embedded at the protocol level, not bolted on.
about.pillar2Desc: Proprietary AI models drive credit scoring, OTC order routing, and P2P arbitration — giving institutional clients a technological edge across LATAM markets.
about.pillar3Desc: Built for executives, corporations, and High-Net-Worth Individuals who demand institutional precision, not consumer-grade DeFi products.
about.value1Desc: We implement emerging technologies not as a trend, but as a tool to redefine financial efficiency.
about.value2Desc: In a decentralized environment, security is our highest promise. We apply the most rigorous standards.
about.value3Desc: Every decision is based on data and technical analysis. We anticipate market movements and validate protocols.
about.value4Desc: We operate under absolute clarity. In financial and crypto markets, transparency is the only path to an unbreakable institutional reputation.
about.value5Desc: We pursue perfection in execution. Every touchpoint — from product interfaces to advisory — must reflect superior quality.
about.value6Desc: We empower clients through knowledge. An educated market is a stronger market, more prone to adopting financial innovations.
about.contactDesc: We work exclusively with institutional clients, corporations, and high-net-worth individuals. Reach out through your preferred channel.

technology.heroDesc: Convexo Protocol integrates best-in-class blockchain infrastructure, institutional custody, and compliance providers to deliver sovereign-grade financial services.
technology.tech1Desc: A 3-tier identity infrastructure that balances privacy with compliance. From zero-knowledge anonymous verification to full enterprise KYB.
technology.tech1Tier2Detail: Full KYC for individuals and enterprises.
technology.tech2Subtitle: ECOP · Chainlink CCIP · Proof of Reserves
technology.tech2Desc: LATAM-native stablecoins pegged to regional currencies. Fully collateral-backed with on-chain proof of reserves and cross-chain interoperability.
technology.tech2Tier1Detail: USD/COP data feeds via Google Finance API.
technology.tech3Desc: Standardized vault infrastructure powering all yield-bearing products. EIP-4626 ensures composability, transparency, and institutional-grade security.
technology.tech4Desc: AI-powered over-the-counter order routing and execution. Autonomous agents handle large-block trades across Telegram, WhatsApp, Signal, and DEX liquidity pools.
technology.providersDesc: We partner with leading institutional infrastructure providers for custody, compliance, oracles, and identity verification.
technology.provider1Desc: Decentralized oracle network for price feeds and cross-chain interoperability
technology.provider2Desc: Uniswap V4 powers our compliant liquidity pools and stablecoin swaps
technology.provider3Desc: Enterprise KYB/KYC verification for institutional and business clients
technology.provider4Desc: Individual identity verification with AI-powered document authentication
technology.provider5Desc: Zero-knowledge proof identity for privacy-persistent on-chain verification
technology.provider6Desc: Multi-signature smart contract wallets for institutional treasury security
technology.provider7Desc: Circle's USDC for fiat-backed stablecoin infrastructure and settlements
technology.provider8Desc: Real-time cryptocurrency price data for oracle feeds and P2P pricing
technology.provider9Desc: Institutional-grade digital asset custody and regulated infrastructure
technology.provider10Desc: Deep liquidity partner for institutional OTC and trading operations

productsHub.heroDesc: Institutional-grade DeFi products for LATAM capital markets. Each product operates on its own subdomain and is accessible via the Convexo Protocol identity stack.
productsHub.product1Desc: Institutional settlement layer for cross-border payments, international collections, and OTC agentic channels.
productsHub.product1H3: OTC Agentic channels with AI routing
productsHub.product2Desc: On-chain corporate credit bonds for LATAM SMEs. Lenders earn 12%+ APY. Borrowers access affordable institutional capital.
productsHub.product3Desc: Tokenized fractional ownership of LATAM commercial and residential real estate. 18% Annual APY, 70% projected 5-year return.
productsHub.product4Desc: Institutional-grade Ethereum yield fund. Active yield optimization for large-scale ETH positions using proprietary vaults.
productsHub.product5Desc: AI-powered peer-to-peer payment system with on-chain arbitration across LATAM currencies. 0.1% commission.
productsHub.product5H4: COP, ARS, MXN, BRL, CLP, PEN

payments.heroDesc: Institutional settlement infrastructure for cross-border payments. Send, receive, and trade digital assets across 20 countries with AI-powered execution and compliance baked in.
payments.ch1Desc: Send payments to international suppliers, including the China corridor and other high-friction markets. Settle in minutes, not days.
payments.ch2Desc: Receive funds from global clients into your Convexo account. Convert to stablecoins or local currency instantly.
payments.ch3Desc: AI-driven OTC desk. Place large-block orders through Telegram, WhatsApp, or Signal. Agents execute with institutional precision.
payments.ch4Desc: Swap directly through private persistent Uniswap V4 liquidity pools. Lower spread, deeper liquidity, fully on-chain.
payments.ch5Desc: Convert and move stablecoins cross-chain via Chainlink CCIP. ECOP, USDC, and more — seamless interoperability.
payments.step1Desc: Complete Digital ID Tier 1 or Tier 2 to access payment rails.
payments.step2Desc: Deposit via OTC, DEX swap, or direct stablecoin transfer.
payments.step3Desc: Initiate payments via app, Telegram bot, or API.
payments.step4Desc: Funds arrive in ~15 minutes. Receive confirmation on-chain.

cbonds.heroDesc: Fractionalized corporate debt instruments for LATAM SMEs. Lenders earn institutional yield. Borrowers access capital at fair market rates. Powered by EIP-4626 vaults and AI credit scoring.
cbonds.lenderStep3: Receive E-Credit tokens representing your position
cbonds.borrowerStep1: Complete Digital ID Tier 3 (AI credit scoring)
cbonds.tech1Desc: Standardized yield-bearing vault. Composable, auditable, and fully on-chain.
cbonds.tech2Desc: Proprietary model trained on LATAM SME data. Tier 3 identity required.
cbonds.tech3Desc: Legally binding digital contracts. On-chain signing with jurisdictional enforceability.

realEstate.heroDesc: Fractional ownership of premium LATAM real estate — fully tokenized, legally backed, and accessible to institutional investors worldwide. 18% Annual APY.
realEstate.prop1Desc: Office buildings, retail centers, and logistics hubs across major LATAM cities.
realEstate.prop2Desc: Premium residential developments in high-growth urban corridors.
realEstate.prop3Desc: Integrated developments combining retail, residential, and office space.
realEstate.step1Desc: Complete Digital ID Tier 2 via Veriff (individual) or Sumsub (enterprise).
realEstate.step2Desc: Select a property vault based on type, location, and risk profile.
realEstate.step3Desc: Deposit capital. Receive ERC-7540 vault tokens representing your ownership.
realEstate.step4Desc: Receive rental yield distributions automatically. Exit at any time.

ethFund.heroDesc: Institutional-grade Ethereum yield fund. Active yield optimization for large-scale ETH positions using proprietary institutional-grade vaults and AI-driven strategies.
ethFund.waitlistDesc: Be among the first institutional clients to access Convexo's ETH Fund when it launches. Early access for Tier 2+ verified accounts.
ethFund.feat1Desc: Proprietary AI models optimize yield across ETH staking, lending protocols, and liquidity provision.
ethFund.feat2Desc: ETH positions secured via Safe multi-sig and HashKey institutional custody infrastructure.
ethFund.feat3Desc: Real-time on-chain performance reporting. Full auditability of all vault positions and strategies.

p2p.heroDesc: Autonomous peer-to-peer payment matching powered by AI. Trade LATAM currencies with institutional-grade security, on-chain reputation, and zero trust required between parties.
p2p.step1Desc: Post a buy or sell order through the Telegram bot @convexobot or the web app.
p2p.step2Desc: The AI agent finds the best counterparty and proposes optimal terms.
p2p.step3Desc: Both parties lock funds in the smart contract escrow. Fully trustless.
p2p.step4Desc: Exchange fiat payment via agreed method. Confirm on-chain.
p2p.step5Desc: AI agent verifies completion and releases funds. Builds on-chain reputation.
p2p.reputationDesc: Every successful P2P transaction builds your on-chain reputation score, unlocking better rates, higher limits, and priority matching. Reputation is non-transferable and permanently recorded on-chain.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How Convexo Protocol collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.intro: Convexo Protocol SAS ("Convexo", "we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform and services, including our blockchain-based financial infrastructure for institutional clients in Latin America. Please read this policy carefully. By accessing or using our services, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, information collected automatically through your use of our services, and information from third-party verification providers.
items: Identity information: full name, date of birth, nationality, and government-issued ID documents for KYC/KYB verification
Contact information: email address, phone number, and physical address
Business information: company name, registration number, business type, financial statements, and ownership structure
Wallet information: blockchain wallet addresses associated with your account
Transaction data: history of trades, swaps, OTC orders, and on-chain interactions
Device and usage data: IP address, browser type, operating system, and usage patterns
Verification data: biometric data processed by third-party providers (Veriff, Sumsub) for identity verification

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUse.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, comply with legal obligations, and protect against fraud.
items: To verify your identity and comply with KYC/KYB and AML regulatory requirements
To process transactions and provide access to our DeFi services
To issue and manage NFT-based digital identity certificates (Convexo Passport, LP NFTs, E-Credit NFTs)
To generate AI-powered credit scores for business clients
To send service notifications, security alerts, and administrative messages
To detect, investigate, and prevent fraudulent or illegal activity
To comply with applicable laws in jurisdictions where we operate including the United States, Colombia, and Hong Kong
To improve our platform and develop new features

dataSharing.title: Information Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties except as described in this policy.
items: Verification providers: Veriff (individual KYC) and Sumsub (business KYB) receive identity documents and biometric data solely for verification purposes
Blockchain networks: wallet addresses and transaction data are inherently public on-chain (Base, Ethereum, UniChain)
Legal compliance: we may disclose information when required by law, subpoena, or government authority
Business transfers: in the event of a merger or acquisition, your information may be transferred as a business asset
Consent: we may share information with your explicit consent for purposes not listed here

blockchain.title: Blockchain and On-Chain Data
blockchain.content: Our services operate on public blockchains. Certain information is permanently recorded on-chain and cannot be deleted or modified. You should be aware of the following when using our blockchain services.
items: Wallet addresses, transaction amounts, and timestamps are publicly visible on Base, Ethereum, and UniChain
NFT minting events and transfers are permanently recorded on-chain
Zero-knowledge proofs used in zkPassport verification protect your underlying identity data while confirming verification status
On-chain data is outside our control and cannot be erased upon request
Smart contract interactions are immutable and cannot be reversed

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.
items: Encryption of sensitive data at rest and in transit using AES-256 and TLS 1.3
Multi-signature wallet infrastructure for institutional asset custody
JWT-based authentication with short-lived access tokens and secure refresh token rotation
Redis-based token blacklisting for immediate session invalidation
Regular security audits and penetration testing
Strict access controls limiting employee access to personal data on a need-to-know basis

userRights.title: Your Rights and Choices
userRights.content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information. We honor rights under GDPR, Colombian Law 1581 of 2012, and other applicable privacy regulations.
items: Right of Access: request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
Right of Rectification: request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
Right of Erasure: request deletion of your personal data where legally permissible (note: on-chain data cannot be deleted)
Right to Restrict Processing: request limitation of how we process your data
Right to Data Portability: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
Right to Object: object to processing of your personal data for certain purposes
Right to Withdraw Consent: withdraw consent where processing is based on consent
To exercise any of these rights, contact us at legal@convexo.xyz

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience on our platform and analyze usage patterns.
items: Essential cookies: necessary for the platform to function, including session management and security
Analytics cookies: help us understand how visitors interact with our platform (we use privacy-respecting analytics tools)
Preference cookies: remember your language and display preferences
You can control cookies through your browser settings; disabling essential cookies may affect platform functionality

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy and to comply with legal obligations.
items: KYC/KYB verification records: minimum 5 years after account closure as required by AML regulations
Transaction records: minimum 7 years for tax and regulatory compliance
Account information: retained for the duration of your account and 3 years thereafter
Communication records: 2 years from the date of communication
On-chain data: permanently stored on the blockchain and cannot be deleted

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: Our platform integrates with third-party services that have their own privacy policies. We encourage you to review the privacy practices of these providers.
items: Veriff — Individual identity verification: veriff.com/privacy-policy
Sumsub — Business KYB verification: sumsub.com/privacy-notice
Chainlink — Decentralized oracle data: chain.link/privacy-policy
Uniswap — Decentralized exchange infrastructure: uniswap.org/privacy-policy
Pinata — IPFS document storage: pinata.cloud/privacy
Resend — Transactional email delivery

changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable laws. We will notify you of material changes by posting the new policy on our website and updating the 'Last Updated' date. For significant changes, we will provide additional notice via email or in-platform notification. Your continued use of our services after the effective date of any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact our Data Protection team.
items: Email: legal@convexo.xyz
Colombia: Calle 36 #128-321, Zona Franca Zonaamerica, Cali, Valle del Cauca
United States: 159 North Wolcott Street, Suite 133, Casper, WY
Hong Kong: Spaces, 8 Queens Road East, Hong Kong
We will respond to all legitimate requests within 30 days

contactCta.title: Questions About Privacy?
contactCta.description: Our Data Protection team is available to answer any questions about how we handle your personal information.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the Convexo Protocol platform and services.
terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("User", "you") and Convexo Protocol SAS ("Convexo", "we", "our", "us"), a company incorporated in Colombia with registered address at Calle 36 #128-321, Zona Franca Zonaamerica, Cali, Valle del Cauca. By accessing or using our platform, smart contracts, digital identity system, or any associated services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use our services.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By creating an account, connecting a wallet, minting a Digital Identity NFT, or otherwise using Convexo Protocol services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms, our Privacy Policy, and any additional guidelines or rules posted on our platform. These Terms may be updated periodically, and your continued use constitutes acceptance of any changes.

eligibility.title: Eligibility and Account Requirements
eligibility.content: To use Convexo Protocol services, you must meet the following eligibility requirements:
items: Be at least 18 years of age
Have legal capacity to enter into binding contracts in your jurisdiction
Not be a resident or citizen of a jurisdiction subject to comprehensive OFAC sanctions (including Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria, and the Crimea region)
Not be listed on any government sanctions list or classified as a Politically Exposed Person (PEP) without prior disclosure
Be acting on your own behalf or be duly authorized to act on behalf of a legal entity
Have successfully completed the required verification tier for the services you wish to access

services.title: Description of Services
services.content: Convexo Protocol provides a suite of institutional DeFi services built on blockchain infrastructure. Our services include:
items: Digital Identity (NFTs): Progressive KYC/KYB verification with Convexo Passport (Tier 1), LP NFTs for individuals and businesses (Tier 2), and E-Credit NFT for credit-scored businesses (Tier 3)
Digital Asset Treasury: Swaps via Uniswap V4 compliant liquidity pools, local stablecoin monetization via Chainlink CCIP, and OTC trading services
Tokenized Corporate Bonds: Access to international funding through blockchain-based corporate bond issuance for verified business clients
E-LOANS: Electronic credit and contract services using EIP-4626 vaults with minimum 12% APY, requiring Tier 3 verification
Real Estate Vaults: Tokenized fractional real estate investment products requiring Tier 2 verification
P2P-AI: AI-powered peer-to-peer marketplace with automated escrow via Telegram, requiring Tier 1 verification
Local Stablecoins: ECOP (Colombian Peso stablecoin) and other LATAM-focused stablecoins

verification.title: Identity Verification and KYC/KYB
verification.content: Access to certain services requires successful completion of our identity verification process. You agree to:
items: Provide accurate, current, and complete information during the verification process
Promptly update your information if it changes
Submit genuine, unaltered documents for identity verification
Consent to biometric processing by our third-party providers (Veriff for individuals, Sumsub for businesses) for KYC/KYB purposes
Allow us to perform ongoing monitoring for AML and sanctions compliance
Understand that false information may result in immediate account termination and may be reported to relevant authorities
Accept that verification decisions are final and subject to our compliance policies

risks.title: Risk Disclosures
risks.content: Using Convexo Protocol involves significant financial and technological risks. By using our services, you acknowledge and accept the following risks:
items: Cryptocurrency and digital asset values can be highly volatile and you may lose part or all of your investment
Smart contract code may contain bugs or vulnerabilities; we conduct audits but cannot guarantee complete security
Blockchain transactions are irreversible; errors in wallet addresses or transaction parameters cannot be reversed
Regulatory changes may affect the availability of our services in your jurisdiction
DeFi protocols may be subject to exploits, flash loan attacks, or liquidity crises beyond our control
Local stablecoins (including ECOP) are subject to smart contract risk, oracle failure, and market risks
Cross-chain operations via Chainlink CCIP may experience delays or failures
AI-generated credit scores are tools for evaluation and do not constitute financial advice or guarantee funding approval

prohibitedUse.title: Prohibited Activities
prohibitedUse.content: You may not use Convexo Protocol services for any unlawful or prohibited purpose. The following activities are strictly forbidden:
items: Money laundering, terrorist financing, or any activity in violation of AML/CTF laws
Sanctions evasion or transacting with sanctioned individuals or entities
Market manipulation, wash trading, or any form of deceptive trading
Creating fake identities or providing fraudulent documents for verification
Using our platform to facilitate tax evasion
Attempting to hack, exploit, or disrupt our smart contracts or platform infrastructure
Using automated bots or scripts to access our services without prior written consent
Reselling or white-labeling our services without an executed partnership agreement

fees.title: Fees and Charges
fees.content: Convexo Protocol charges fees for certain services. All fees are disclosed prior to transaction confirmation and are subject to change with notice.
items: OTC Trading: 1.5% fixed spread over market price
Uniswap V4 Swaps: 0.3% swap fee on compliant liquidity pool transactions
P2P-AI: 0.1% commission on all trades processed through the AI agent
NFT Minting: Gas fees applicable on the respective blockchain network (Base, Ethereum, or UniChain)
E-LOANS: Interest rates are set by the loan creator with a minimum APY of 12%
All fees are non-refundable once a transaction has been confirmed on-chain
Gas fees paid to blockchain networks are outside our control and may vary significantly

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All content, software, smart contract code, and materials on the Convexo Protocol platform are owned by or licensed to Convexo Protocol SAS and are protected by intellectual property laws.
items: The Convexo Protocol brand, logo, and trademarks are proprietary to Convexo Protocol SAS
Our smart contract code on GitHub is available under the applicable open-source license
You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from our proprietary materials without written permission
NFTs minted through our platform grant you ownership of the token; they do not transfer intellectual property rights in associated content

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers and No Financial Advice
disclaimers.content: Convexo Protocol provides infrastructure and tools; we do not provide financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. Our services are provided 'as is' and 'as available' without warranties of any kind.
items: We disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose
AI-powered credit scores are informational tools and do not constitute financial advice
Past performance of any asset or product on our platform does not guarantee future results
We do not guarantee continuous or uninterrupted access to our services
We are not responsible for losses caused by third-party service failures, blockchain network issues, or force majeure events

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Convexo Protocol SAS, its directors, officers, employees, and partners shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or digital assets. Our total aggregate liability to you for any claims arising from use of our services shall not exceed the fees you paid to us in the three months preceding the claim. Some jurisdictions do not allow these limitations; in such cases, liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by law.

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Convexo Protocol SAS and its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses, including reasonable legal fees, arising from your use of our services, violation of these Terms, infringement of third-party rights, or provision of false or misleading information during verification.

governing.title: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
governing.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Colombia. For any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of our services:
items: We encourage you to first contact us at legal@convexo.xyz to resolve disputes informally
If informal resolution fails, disputes will be submitted to binding arbitration in Cali, Colombia under the rules of the Colombian Chamber of Commerce
For users located in the European Union, mandatory consumer protection laws of your country of residence may also apply
Class action waivers: to the extent permitted by law, you waive the right to participate in class action lawsuits against Convexo Protocol

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to Convexo Protocol services at any time, with or without notice, for any of the following reasons:
items: Violation of these Terms or our Acceptable Use Policy
Failure to pass or maintain KYC/KYB verification requirements
Detection of fraudulent, illegal, or suspicious activity on your account
Compliance with a legal order or regulatory requirement
Extended inactivity of your account (more than 24 months)
Upon termination, your access to platform features will be revoked; however, NFTs in your wallet and on-chain assets remain under your custody

changes.title: Changes to These Terms
changes.content: We may revise these Terms from time to time. We will provide at least 14 days' notice of material changes via email or prominent in-platform notification. The updated Terms will be effective on the date specified in the notice. If you do not agree to the revised Terms, you must stop using our services before the effective date. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: For questions, concerns, or legal notices regarding these Terms, please contact us through the following channels:
items: Legal inquiries: legal@convexo.xyz
General support: hello@convexo.xyz
Telegram: @convexoprotocol
Registered address: Calle 36 #128-321, Zona Franca Zonaamerica, Cali, Valle del Cauca, Colombia

contactCta.title: Have Legal Questions?
contactCta.description: Our legal team is available to clarify any questions about these Terms and Conditions.

amlCft.title: AML/CFT Policy
amlCft.subtitle: Our commitment to Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Financing of Terrorism compliance

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Convexo Protocol is committed to maintaining the highest standards of compliance with Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Counter-Financing of Terrorism (CFT) regulations. This policy outlines our comprehensive approach to preventing illicit activities and ensuring regulatory compliance across all our operations.

aml.title: Anti-Money Laundering Policy
aml.description: We implement robust AML measures to detect and prevent money laundering activities within our ecosystem. Our approach includes comprehensive risk assessment, customer due diligence, and ongoing monitoring of all transactions.

requirements.title: AML Requirements
requirements.req1: Customer Identity Verification through progressive KYC tiers
requirements.req2: Source of funds verification for high-value transactions
requirements.req3: Ongoing transaction monitoring and suspicious activity reporting
requirements.req4: Regular review and updating of customer risk profiles

cft.title: Counter-Financing of Terrorism
cft.description: Our CFT measures are designed to identify and prevent any financing activities related to terrorism. We maintain strict compliance with international sanctions and watchlists.

measures.title: CFT Measures
measures.measure1: Screening against international sanctions lists (OFAC, UN, EU)
measures.measure2: Enhanced due diligence for high-risk jurisdictions
measures.measure3: Real-time transaction monitoring for suspicious patterns
measures.measure4: Immediate reporting of any suspected terrorist financing activities

kyc.title: Know Your Customer (KYC) Requirements
kyc.description: Our progressive KYC system ensures proper customer identification while maintaining user privacy through zero-knowledge proofs and advanced cryptographic techniques.

individual.title: Individual Users
individual.req3: Enhanced verification for higher transaction limits

monitoring.title: Transaction Monitoring and Reporting
monitoring.description: We employ advanced analytics and machine learning algorithms to monitor all transactions for suspicious activities. Our monitoring system operates 24/7 to ensure real-time detection of potentially illicit activities.

activities.title: Monitoring Activities
activities.activity1: Real-time transaction analysis using AI-powered risk scoring
activities.activity2: Pattern recognition for unusual transaction behaviors
activities.activity4: Regular reporting to relevant financial intelligence units

compliance.title: Compliance and Regular Updates
compliance.description: This policy is regularly reviewed and updated to ensure compliance with evolving regulatory requirements across all jurisdictions where we operate.
compliance.updates: Last updated: March 2026. This policy is subject to change as regulations evolve and our services expand.

contact.title: Compliance Contact
contact.description: For any compliance-related inquiries or to report suspicious activities, please contact our compliance team:
